reasoning_model_1: The model successfully conveys a nervous tone throughout the short clip. reasoning_model_2: The model expresses the required 'Cognitive State' (nervousness) with high intensity. model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner. While Model 2 exhibits a very vivid and possibly more intense nervous tone, it fails the fundamental instruction to 'read this sentence' by adding substantial hallucinated text. Model 1 adheres to the script constraints (reading only the requested sentence), and while it has a single word substitution/mispronunciation ('beating' vs 'meeting'), it is a far more usable and accurate generation than Model 2's uncontrolled output. Model 1 correctly balances the requested paralinguistic feature with the textual constraints.
